brand.name: String — Brand name as it should appear on screen
brand.logo_url: URL — Transparent PNG/SVG logo for end card and overlays
brand.tagline: String — Brand or campaign tagline, if any

product.name: String — Product name as it should appear on screen
product.usp: String — The ONE thing this ad communicates
images: URL — High-res product images (lifestyle or packshot)

creative_direction.theme: String — Creative theme (e.g., 'High-energy fitness lifestyle', 'Minimal luxury unboxing', 'Raw UGC testimonial')
creative_direction.tone: Enum [humorous, serious, inspirational, edgy, luxurious, casual, urgent, nostalgic, playful, authoritative, asmr, sarcastic, wholesome]
creative_direction.visual_style: Enum [live_action, animation_2d, animation_3d, motion_graphics, mixed_media, stop_motion, ai_generated, ugc_native, screen_capture]
strict_inclusions: String — Must appear (e.g., 'Product visible within first 3s', 'Logo on screen last 2s')
strict_exclusions: String — Hard no's (e.g., 'No red color', 'No text on first scene', 'No stock footage look')

the_hook.type: Enum [visual_surprise, bold_claim, question, product_in_action, pattern_interrupt, relatable_moment, sound_hook, text_hook] — Hook mechanic
the_hook.visual: String — What the viewer SEES in seconds 0.0–1.5 (e.g., 'Extreme close-up of serum dropping onto skin in slow-mo', 'Product smashing through a stack of competitor boxes')
the_hook.audio: String — What the viewer HEARS in seconds 0.0–1.5 (e.g., 'Satisfying pop sound', 'Record scratch', 'Whispered question', 'Silence then bass drop')

characters.talent_type: Enum [real_actor, ai_avatar, animated_character, ugc_style_creator, hand_model, no_talent]

cast.demeanor: String — Energy and body language (e.g., 'Confident and relaxed', 'Excited unboxing energy')

scenes.visual_description: String — What is visually happening. Be specific about composition, lighting, setting, product placement
scenes.on_screen_text: String — Exact text displayed. Keep under 6 words per line
scenes.text_animation: Enum [fade_in, slide_up, slide_left, typewriter, pop, glitch, kinetic, none]

camera.shot_type: Enum [extreme_close_up, close_up, medium_close_up, medium, medium_wide, wide, overhead, pov, dutch_angle]
camera.movement: Enum [static, pan_left, pan_right, tilt_up, tilt_down, zoom_in, zoom_out, tracking, dolly_in, dolly_out, orbit, handheld_shake, crane_up]
camera.transition_in: Enum [cut, dissolve, wipe, zoom, whip_pan, morph, glitch, match_cut, none]

voiceover.script: String — Full VO script. MAX 25 words for 10s

audio.music_genre: String — Genre (e.g., 'Lo-fi hip hop', 'Upbeat pop', 'Cinematic strings', 'Trap beat')

offer.offer_text: String — e.g., '20% Off', 'Free Shipping'. Under 5 words
offer.promo_code: String — Code to display on screen
